rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Merlex Stucco, Inc. To Provide Further Responses To Asbestos General Order No. 129 Plaintiffs Standard Interrogatories To Defendants, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, June 2, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel defendant Merlex Stucco, Inc. to provide further responses to asbestos General Order No. 129 plaintiff¿s standard interrogatories to defendants, and request for sanctions is on for a compliance hearing. If either side believes that any issues remain, that side should send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org with a cc to the other side no later than 4:30pm today stating, without argument, what issues remain in dispute and then both sides should appear at the hearing. If no email is received by 4:30pm today, then the compliance hearing will be taken off calendar. = (220/HEK)
